language.label: Language
language.description: Choose the language used for buttons, menus, labels, and other UI text.
language.hint: This only changes the app interface. It does not translate note titles, note content, or generated study material.
language.storageHint: The selected language is currently stored locally and can be synced to a backend user profile later.

reminders.description: Get one daily browser notification when you have study pages due.
reminders.timeHint: Reminders follow your current device timezone and are checked after this local time.
reminders.catchUpHint: If nothing is due at that time, Rememo will still send one reminder later that same day when pages become due.

status.unsupported: Push notifications are not supported in this browser
